summary: Monitor does not read child-agents.jsonl, so launch proof relies solely on swarm-state.json counters.
Telemetry contract/doc gaps: README lacks schema details, heartbeat requirements, and bundle/result path specifics; swarm-state example task_id inconsistency.
Counter naming/logic inconsistencies (started vs launched, partial status handling) and hardcoded SS-250 label can mislead monitor.
consensus_notes: Multiple workers independently flagged missing child-agents.jsonl consumption and telemetry naming mismatches.
Documentation gaps are consistent across README vs commander/launcher expectations.
